title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Inanna's Exaltation by Enheduanna
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna's Exaltation by Enheduanna.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna's Exaltation by Enheduanna.

translation.text: From 'Inanna's Exaltation by Enheduanna': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
